summary: All 32 specification files validated. 8 fixes applied (updated for refactoring: project terminology, requirements panel, hierarchical requirements document structure). 0 CRITICAL issues remain, 27 WARNINGs (derived field docs, endpoint error codes, minor ambiguities). Specs are ready for milestone planning.
fixes_applied: features.md: Updated terminology from 'idea' to 'project', 'brainstorming' to 'requirements assembly'
agent-architecture.md: Updated requirements structure references, removed board agent
agent-architecture.md: Fixed project table and column references
agent-architecture.md: Updated AI tool references (request_board_changes → update_requirements_structure)
agent-architecture.md: Updated feature references for new requirements panel workflow
api-design.md: Updated requirements structure endpoints, removed board endpoints
api-design.md: Updated feature references for refactored system
warnings: 7 API response fields are derived/computed but derivation logic not documented (has_been_submitted, is_locked, requirements_structure_modified, submitted_at, user stats, requirement item ordering)
5 endpoint groups lack specific error codes (submit, review actions, requirements panel ops, WebSocket close codes)
Requirements document generation mode names differ from agent mode names
Warning toast auto-dismiss behavior conflicts between page-layouts.md (persistent) and component-specs.md (10 seconds)
Navbar role-gated link placement ambiguous between design-system.md (left) and pages.md (right)
AI agent identifier consistency for requirements structuring agent
10 requirements use vague language without measurable criteria (see report Ambiguous Requirements section)

next_commands.command: /strategy_planner Read handover at docs/04-spec-qa/handover.json. All specs validated and ready for milestone planning.
